# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php
declare(strict_types=1);

$templatesDir = __DIR__ . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . 'templates';

$page = $_GET['page'] ?? 'home';
$page = is_string($page) ? $page : 'home';
$page = trim($page);

// Normalize
$page = str_replace("\0", '', $page);
$page = str_replace('\\', '/', $page);
$page = preg_replace('#/+#', '/', $page);

// Allow: letters, numbers, underscore, dash, and slashes for subpages (e.g. blog/post)
if ($page === '' || !preg_match('#^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+(?:/[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)*$#', $page)) {
    $page = '404';
}

// Resolve file
$templatePath = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . str_replace('/', DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR, $page) . '.php';
$realTemplatesDir = realpath($templatesDir);
$realTemplatePath = realpath($templatePath);

if ($realTemplatesDir === false) {
    http_response_code(500);
    exit('Templates directory not found.');
}

if ($realTemplatePath === false || strpos($realTemplatePath, $realTemplatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR) !== 0 || !is_file($realTemplatePath)) {
    $fallback404 = $templatesDir . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . '404.php';
    if (is_file($fallback404)) {
        http_response_code(404);
        require $fallback404;
        exit;
    }

    http_response_code(404);
    exit('Page not found.');
}

require $realTemplatePath;
